offer: For property managers processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual report generation causes late compliance submissions. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating compliance documents from financial data.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant community
